properties.title: GEA Synthesis Map Snippet 2 (Chile) - v0.0.12
properties.description: Snippet of the Global Ecosystems Atlas Synthesis Map (v0.0.12) in Chile.

all_data.title: Full Snippet Data Package (ZIP)
all_data.description: A compressed archive containing 4 individual GeoTIFF files: the Synthesis Map, Standalone Ecosystems, Data Mask, and Source Data products.

gea_synthesis.title: Global Ecosystems Atlas Synthesis Map
gea_synthesis.description: A 3-band multi-class Cloud Optimised GeoTIFF that depicts the distributions of ecosystem functional groups, biomes and realms.

raster:bands.name: efg
raster:bands.description: Pixel values represent ecosystem functional groups according to the GEA numeral scheme.

raster:bands.name: biome
raster:bands.description: Pixel values represent biome type according to the GEA numeral scheme.

raster:bands.name: realm
raster:bands.description: Pixel values represents realm type according to the GEA numeral scheme.

gea_standalone.title: Global Ecosystems Atlas Standalone Ecosystems
gea_standalone.description: A multiband Cloud Optimised GeoTIFF that depicts the distributions of ecosystems that cannot be served in a multiclass raster due to overlying or underlying other ecosystem types, such as pelagic ecosystems or sea ice.

gea_data_mask.title: Global Ecosystems Atlas Data Mask
gea_data_mask.description: A 3-band Cloud Optimised GeoTIFF with bands intended to support analyses of the gea_synthesis and gea_standalone data products.

raster:bands.name: data_mask
raster:bands.description: Pixel values represent (0) no data, (1) valid data, (2) source data that could not be cross-referenced to the Global Ecosystem Typology.

raster:bands.name: efg_disagreement
raster:bands.description: Pixel values represent the number of different ecosystems mapped by overlapping source datasets.

raster:bands.name: dataset_count
raster:bands.description: Pixel values represent the number of source datasets that have mapped the pixel.

gea_sources.title: Global Ecosystems Atlas Source Data
gea_sources.description: A 3-band Cloud Optimised GeoTIFF with bands that depict aspects of the source data, such as source data id, the year the data were produced and the native cell size of source data.

raster:bands.name: source_id
raster:bands.description: The individual identifier for each source dataset in the Global Ecosystems Atlas.

raster:bands.name: cell_size
raster:bands.description: The pixel size in metres of the source dataset.

raster:bands.name: dataset_year
raster:bands.description: The production year of the source dataset.
